first_encounter.welcome:
You have encounted a sage! 
 sages are masters of their craft, ready to share their wisdom with those deemed worthy.
 Learn from them to unlock new skills and enhance your abilities!

1.welcome:
Hello there, traveller!
 I’m here to help you power up. Isn’t this exciting?
 Alright, shall we begin?
1.quiz_time: Wonderful! Now, let’s see how well you’ve grasped it.
1.wrong:
Oh no, close but not quite! 
 Don’t worry, you’re learning. 
Just remember: Solve it from left to right.
 Practice makes perfect!

2.welcome:
You have encounted a sage! 
Hmph. Another feeble adventurer. 
Your skills are weak—barely worth my time. 
But... I suppose I can teach you BOBMAS rule. 
Pay attention!
2.quiz_time:
Enough spoon-feeding. 
Let’s see if you were listening.
2.wrong:
Ugh… wrong. 
It’s like I said: Use the BODMAS rule and solve from left to right. 
Focus this time, will you?

3.welcome:
You have encounted a sage! 
Greetings, young one. 
Your journey has been long, and the road ahead will test your very soul. 
But first, it is time to learn the final lesson on how to analysis problem statement.
3.quiz_time:
Now, let us see if you have the wisdom to wield such power. 
Your understanding will be tested.
3.wrong:
Not quite, but do not despair. 
Patience is the mark of the wise. 
Remember this: Read carefully, look out for keywords, solve step by step. 
 Don't be disheartne just try again, you can do it!
